title: hieracium pleiophyllum
intro: Hieracium pleiophyllum, also known as pleiophyllous hawk's-beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Hieracium pleiophyllum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, salve, or infusion, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to treat a range of ailments.
